_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for product identity AND commercial launch configuration. Renaming/repricing/launching the product = editing this file. Do NOT hardcode these values anywhere else. 'Motionstack' is the chosen product name and registry namespace (motionstack.dev, @motionstack); a full trademark/name-availability clearance has not yet been performed. All values under `commerce` are launch controls; concrete prices and legal terms are intentionally absent until human sign-off (see docs/41).
description: Beautiful, production-ready animated React and shadcn components you install as editable source.
tagline: Animated React & shadcn components, installable as editable source.

commerce._comment: Launch controls. `launchMode` drives which CTAs and surfaces appear. Modes: development | private-preview | public-beta | launched. No purchase button renders unless checkoutEnabled. No concrete price renders unless pricingEnabled AND pricingFinalized. PHASE DECISION (docs/45 §Private-preview phase): the project operates as a LIMITED PRIVATE PREVIEW — checkout+pricing disabled, private registry enabled, waitlist enabled, Batch 6+ rapid development allowed, paid launch blocked, provider/pricing/legal DEFERRED. Preview terms require OWNER approval via env MOTIONSTACK_PREVIEW_TERMS_APPROVED=1 (NOT set here). This is NOT approval of prices, licenses, checkout, paid launch, lifetime updates, refunds, team/agency terms, or a commerce provider.
